calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon representing the San Francisco Public Guardian. Daniel Conrad for Stefan Vogel. Lawrence Siracusa for Barbara de Vries.

Mr. Ferdon stated that an heir hunter had located Mr. Vogel's brother. Mr. Conrad presented the Court and Mr. Ferdon with a copy of census/death records as proof. Mr. Siracusa stated that he was prepared to file the documents/proof this afternoon. Upon review of the documentation, Mr. Ferdon stated that it appeared that Stefan Vogel is Mr. Vogel's brother. The Court then granted the petition (order for the same signed in open court). Bond is set at $602,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
